programme.title: ABC Kids Programs resume at 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Prince Cyrus needs help defending his village from pirates.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Lunagirl discovers that if you really can't share something, then you might lose it completely.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
programme.desc: When Thomas finds a treasure map he creates The Big Adventure Club to seek the treasure, but when Sandy wants to join, Thomas says she's too little, so Sandy forms her own club.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: After a mudslide buries a hot spring snake's home, Tweak, Dashi, Tunip and Paani use the brand new Terra-Gup 1 to navigate the harsh Himalayan conditions and find the snake a new hot spring home.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: When Captain Squid leaves his treasure map in the Little Kingdom, Redbeard leads Ben, Holly, and Nanny Plum on a treasure hunt. The map says the treasure is deep underwater, and guarded by a mermaid and a golden sea monster.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: When the Tubby Phone rings, Dipsy comes slowly down on the Dup Dup to answer it - and then Dipsy goes back up again!

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Welcome to the Sesame Street Corn Party! As everyone brings a special food made from corn that their family makes, they learn how corn is used in many way.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: When Daniel and his friends learn to play T-ball, they find out that Henrietta is a dance teacher and a T-ball coach.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat opens his own theme park in which he is the star. But he finds out that giving the Teddy and Bananas customers a cheesy good time is not all fun.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat sees Lulu using special gadget she's invented and decides to sell them in his shop. He tells the Bananas the Lulu Doovers will make all their jobs easier.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Pando and Sula sit in the Fire Engine, but when it's Bing's turn it leaves! Flop, Amma, Sula, and Bing walk to Bing's house where Arlo is stuck on the neighbour's roof. Bing must help him get down.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Helicopters are used for all kinds of things, including rescuing people. They're just like bubbles because helicopters can move in any direction in the air, even around in circles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's family go to the museum's moon exhibition with George's friend, Edmond Elephant.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: The Wiggles are a having a singing lesson today, singing a gentle song called 'Butterfly, Fly Butterfly,' but Captain Feathersword is having trouble singing softly.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Calm in the barn is disturbed when a pair of ducks set up a nest on the roof of Bitzer's kennel. The ducks don't take kindly to efforts to encourage them to move on.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: A pigeon comes down the chimney at 32 Windsor Gardens. Paddington nurses the poor bird back to health and discovers a new friend in Pigeonton, but can he let him go?

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Heroic Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Peter escapes a very chatty Mrs Tiggy-winkle to go strawberry-raiding, he is surprised to be helped out of trouble by none other than the feisty old hedgehog herself.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: The PJMs defeat the Ninjas with ease, and become over-confident in their powers. But Night Ninja's secretly plotting to acquire PJ powers for himself.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo use the 'Way of the Woods' to save Preston from danger while camping.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Pippen loses her voice before her concert. Can Vida help her get it back in time for her solo?

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: Neha can't think of a poem for Open Mic Night at the restaurant, so Flower and Flour take her around the plaza for inspiration.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are playing in their clubhouse. The clubhouse has a fold-down counter at the front. The children pretend to be a little shop for the parents to buy things from.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: It's time for Bluey and Bingo to get out of the bath. But Dad has decided not to tell them what to do and gets roped into a game of Burger Shop.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger challenges the Baby Pea-Rexes to a race around Vegesaur Valley? with no rules! First one in the water hole wins!

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: On Spyke's last day at Kangaroo Beach, the cadets build an epic landcastle by the lake to give her a send-off she'll never forget.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel competes in a Happy Patty Clap event.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: The Octonauts are exploring Antarctica when Shellington discovers strange microscopic creatures living under the ice.

programme.title: Bluey Fancy Restaurant
programme.desc: Gemma, Evan, and Ryan take flight with an airline-themed diner, cloud costumes, and jelly trifle - hoping to earn a smoochy kiss from Mum and Dad.

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Emma and Matt are making big and small buildings for their city; Matt makes a spotty tall giraffe and a little baby giraffe for their city zoo.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: The Pioneers work on Annie's farm, but Sarah accidentally lets the sheep go loose. They knock over Annie's stove which starts a fire.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: Silver Paw tries to make a sleepover party go to sleep so she can steal their late-night pizza snack. With Jeremy tucked tightly into bed, Deena must learn to crack the puzzles all by herself.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Amare asks Stanley to help her on the farm. Stanley helps in his own, Stanley way.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Monster Camp
programme.desc: When Jay discovers Nikhil had camped in the wild, he wants to have a monster camping adventure in their garden. Will they meet any monsters? And will Jay be as brave as Nikhil?

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: When Tango alerts the Nature Explorers to an out-of-place worm wriggling on the sidewalk, they want to do something to help.

programme.title: Mittens and Pants
programme.desc: Puppies Pants and Popcorn try to help various animals with puppy help. But puppy help is very energetic and isn't exactly... helpful in all situations.

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: MeMo and BaBa enjoy seeing and playing with floaty things.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups go on a racing car adventure to win a race. But when Pockets beats Spin and Giggle, will they find another way so that they can all be winners?

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Eddie goes to the cinema with Akil and Nina, learning to enjoy himself even when it gets a little noisy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: At the park, Bluey struggles to learn how to ride her bike. As she and Dad watch her friends' determination with their own tasks, Bluey is inspired to give it another try.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds explore a demolition site! They see workers use drills, sledgehammers, and big machines to tear down a house. Trucks clear the mess and some parts get reused!

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: After being disturbed by some caterpillars and moths in The Makery, Nim decides to make a bendy caterpillar picture, a cheesy pumpkin and a jungle t-shirt.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Shirley Shawn the Unicorn and Tsehay are in the Wiggly Kitchen, what will they find today? Sing along to the Wiggly favourite Hot Potato, and the Wiggle Town Dancing Water Police are here to help!

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: When a waved albatross snatches Mr Hammond's pocket bird guide book from Jen, it's up to Andy to find it and bring it home. Andy heads to the Galapagos Islands in search of the lost book.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo fly high for yummy leaves, but a stubborn goat has other ideas.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Tiddles the Tortoise, Doctor Hamster's pet, has got stuck up a tree, again! Who can save him?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It is Granny and Grandpa's anniversary. Peppa and George go to Mr Fox's Shop to find them a present. Mr Fox's Shop sells everything.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.sub-title: What's It Like To Be A Tree?
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou try out being trees, which is mostly about keeping still, and they make a very large new friend named Moa.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the Peas reluctantly babysit a mischievous Baby Bananaraptor that proves to be more than a handful.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The twins really want a pet, so Nanny Plum sets out to get them one. She magics them up Pippin the hamster. The Wise Old Elf brings Pippin a hamster wheel, but Pippin runs too fast in it and breaks out of the castle.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Pippen fakes wacky symptoms to relax in the recovery room, but what if someone really needs her bed?

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie + Triggs get the giggles as they repeatedly ask Dad, \.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: While visiting Mr. Moon's shop with Granny, Maddie finds it difficult to choose what type of ice cream to get - there are just so many different flavours to choose from!

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley needs to do some jobs for the community, but all his vehicles are out of power for some reason. On closer inspection it's due to a cloud of butterflies obscuring.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: A mouth-brooding jawfish father has lost his eggs, and the Octonauts must brave strong currents and other obstacles to help get them back to him!

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Luna secretly steals Motsuki's teleport power. Gekko and Catboy investigate, but mess up with catastrophic results. Can they find it in themselves to put it right?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee has a pot of bubble mixture, and he's blowing fantastic bubbles. It's really hard to do but most of the Squirrels eventually get the hang of it, and the club rapidly fills up with lots of bubbles.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: On Spyke's last day at Kangaroo Beach, the cadets build an epic landcastle by the lake to give her a send-off she'll never forget.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Sarah puts on a captivating lunchtime theatre show outside the Wholefish Cafe. It's so good that Charlie doesn't notice his stove burst into flames.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Lost Tunnels
programme.desc: When Benjamin gets lost in a network of underground tunnels, Peter and Lily set out to find him.

programme.title: Cookie Monster's Foodie Truck
programme.desc: Cookie Monster and Gonger get a call and take an order from their friend who needs help with making guacamole. Gonger is excited because he gets to use a molcajete, a bowl made of rock, to make guacamole.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Tries Something New with Grandpere
programme.desc: Daniel is having a special day playing astronauts at Grandpere's house! When Daniel tries to make his snack all by himself, he struggles to spread the peanut butter.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Nim's in the business of making things, including an eggbox flower picture, a submarine drawing, hot-cross flower buns and a cupcake seller's tray.

programme.title: Play School: World by Night
programme.desc: Kaeng and Abi are joined by special guest Kirsten, an astronomer who shows us how the earth spins, turning day into night.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Join The Wiggles for a day of fun! The Tree of Wisdom shakes its leafy branches, Simon battles hiccups with help from his friends, and everyone heads to the beach for 'Coco Loco'.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!
programme.desc: Darcy makes some mistakes on her first day on Sodor but soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish has a collection of Surprise Egg Friend figurines but one is missing. Tiny tortoise is nowhere to be seen.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: After dinner Tish and Bobby ask for dessert but Rosa admits there is none. She suggests Pola's boiled sweets instead but then suddenly the lights go out.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Fossilised honeysuckle is extremely yummy and extremely difficult to crack open. Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes must use all their clever thinking to open their prized meal.

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back 152 million years to the time of diplodocus, a massive 25-metre-long, plant-eating dinosaur.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Nori and Dot are stuck in a treehouse with no door. Mojo and Bo hatch a plan to save them!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: A birthday party misunderstanding.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dr Hamster is visiting the playgroup today and she has brought a giant ant farm. With all the talk about ants, they didn't notice they've all escaped! Thankfully, the children help lead the ants back home.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It is World Book Day at playgroup but Peppa has so many favourite books she just cannot decide which to go as.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: While helping Nana to prune Mum's tree, Maddie is shocked to learn that this means cutting off all its branches! But as always, Dado has a few crafty surprises up his sleeve.

programme.title: Stan and Gran
programme.desc: Stan spots a Swift and spies a mystery - why don't they ever land? Grace acts as air-traffic control and Stan and Gran take to the skies.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: All Mandy wants is to attract more bee visitors to her Bee Hotel than James - but she ends up starting a fire at the Watermill.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: When Frizzy's dad gets into trouble in the mountains, Frizzy steps up to lead the rescue mission and save the day!

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Trigger Fish
programme.desc: When he's carried away by a cyclonic waterspout, Kwazii finds himself stranded in the open ocean with a triggerfish who's made her home underneath the damaged Gup-B.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Green Goblin steals Captain America's shield.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: Neha can't think of a poem for Open Mic Night at the restaurant, so Flower and Flour take her around the plaza for inspiration.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: When Big Lizard and Cosima get covered in nectar they become unwilling house guests to some over-friendly beetles. Could Dunk come to their rescue?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels become enchanted when they hear a piece of music from Duggee's choir. After finding that the choir are too ill to perform, the Squirrels decide to step up and take their place in the performance.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly and her friends must stay in the courtyard and play with Holly's little twin sisters Daisy and Poppy. All is fine until the twins borrow a magic wand.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Nevillle has a large cardboard refrigerator box and he has big plans for it! But when the job becomes too much for one hippo, Superbuns and her friends help save Nevillle's creation!

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Music Meister is stealing the singing voices of all the people in Gotham. Now it's up to bashful Buff to gain confidence in his voice and use it to take down Music Meister.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When it's Bingo's turn to bring her Kindy's Bob Bilby puppet home and record their weekend in the scrapbook, the family resolve to put down their screens and show him a good time.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: The sheep discover a mysterious buzzing object in their field. Shaun investigates and finds it's full of bees, who make the flock's life a misery.

programme.title: Lego Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Cole reunites with Nya to help her and Sora find the Dragon Core in the Land of Lost Things, and Kai uses Heatwaves recovery to connect with Wyldfyre.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Albert Einstein and the Story of Another Mary
programme.desc: Inspired by his hero, Albert Einstein, Sheldon tries his hand at the violin. Also, Mary and Meemaw secretly buy a pregnancy test when Mary thinks she's pregnant.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Perfect Score and a Bunsen Burner Marshmallow
programme.desc: Sheldon moves in with Dr. Sturgis for the weekend to see what his life would be like in college. Also, a lonely Mary tries to bond with the other Coopers during Sheldon's absence.

programme.title: Ultimate Vets
programme.desc: Rory has a big surgery on a dwarf hamster, Cheryl checks out two not so fluffy kittens and James has an emergency visit from a Whippet with a mystery injury.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Keepers are forced to hand-rear a pair of precious fennec fox babies, but will the round the clock care be enough to keep them alive?

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: It's a race against time to unify a pride of lions before they turn on one of the females, can old boys Klaus and Simba save the day?

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Camelot's legendary tournament has only one rule - there are no rules. As the mystic city fills with warriors, they are joined by Gilli, who despite his small stature, has victory in his sights.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall and the crew pitch up in British Columbia, Canada. It's an explorer's paradise with infinite untouched wilderness and spectacular animals like the wolf eel, the giant pacific octopus and the huge killer whale.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: Juleka's mother gets akumatised into Captain Hardrock. Steering an impregnable ship and armed with a pirate sword, she wants to blast her music across Paris. Prepare to board, mateys Ladybug and Cat Noir.

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: When the city experiences a toilet paper shortage, Beth and Harold investigate and discover it's their old rival Sewer Mike who is the mastermind behind it all.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: After Panda gets injured on the basketball court, the Bears invite Charlie to be on their basketball team. But when Charlie gets too good, he starts to ruin all the fun of the game.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Grizz screens an epic amateur movie he just made for a focus group.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Baby Panda happily lives in a closed off environment for study.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: On the Bears' visit to a medieval vegetable-village, Grizz starts to believe that he's the rightful king.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: SOS From the Future: A Dark New Enemy Appears!
programme.desc: Life in the present may be peaceful but trouble is stirring in the future. Trunks is risking it all to get back to the past to find help.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Hope! Redux Awaken in the Present, Trunks
programme.desc: With barely enough time to stop the dark entity that's after him, Trunks travels back to the past.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When Buttercup gets super lice, her sisters must battle them to save her.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: As Adele says goodbye to The Next Step, she tries to mend fences with Olive. Things get complicated between Heath and Pascale as Anthony deals with Adele leaving.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: We meet the rather eccentric Georgian philosopher Jeremy Bentham, super-rich Roman politician Crassus raps about his 'blinging' lifestyle, and Johannes Gutenberg goes head-to-head with some monks.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Lousy Lunch Orders
programme.desc: Ezra is outraged when everyone's treat day lunch orders are replaced with healthy food and insists on tracking down the culprit.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The agents compete in Olympic-style games to determine who gets to be Ms O for the day.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Otto and Oren compete for votes to become Captain Fun.

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs resume at 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Hap teams up with the Jedi to rescue his friends.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Owlette is teaching Owl lots of stunts and tricks. But Romeo wants some Owl-y power of his own.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
programme.desc: When Thomas borrows Percy's lucky bell for a dangerous delivery, Thomas isn't careful and loses the bell.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: An earthquake in Alaska causes tremors that travel all the way to the Nevada Desert, causing big trouble in a pool of water that a group of tiny pupfish call home.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Ben Elf and his parents are going on holiday in the elf truck, but Gaston the Ladybird has swallowed the car keys! Ben and Holly take Gaston to the vet to retrieve the keys.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po have their favourite toys to play with, but Laa-Laa doesn't have the ball so the others help find it.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: It's Jobs Day! Elmo and his friends are learning about jobs they would like to do when they grow up.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Max learns that Mr. McFeely is the story time reader and a mail carrier. You can be more than one thing!

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Amy is disappointed when her photo isn't in the Cuddles Avenue Newspaper. The Bananas try to help by following her around with a camera, just in case she does something exciting.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Bananas are having a hard time carrying their shopping and the Teddies groceries back from Rat's shop. When Morgan asks if they'll help with one more thing, the Bananas don't know how they'll cope.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Coco are drawing Gilly a picture. When Bing goes to say hello, Charlie does a big squiggle on Bing's drawing! Gilly then shows them a game called Squiggling.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Alpacas are such interesting animals - did you know that they don't have any top teeth? Join Fizzy and Suds for a day on an alpaca farm - so much to learn.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa and George to the playground, but does not understand the children's rules.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: It's playtime at Wiggle House! The Wiggles are having a fun playing with their beloved toys, singing along to 'The Transportation Parade' and grab your favourite toy and join the fun!

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun discovers that being in charge while Bitzer is busy with the Farmer is not just a case of being the bossy dog.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Judy has forgotten to do her homework and can't think of what to do for her geography project. Paddington tries to help and ends up being the subject once he talks about his home.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the High-Flying Badger
programme.desc: When a very sleepy Tommy Brock is hoisted up into the Squirrel Camp, Peter and friends must work out how to get the snoozing brute back down to earth before he wakes up.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: The PJMs defeat the Ninjas with ease, and become over-confident in their powers. But Night Ninja's secretly plotting to acquire PJ powers for himself.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Is there a nine-legged octopus monster in Lake Swoppiton, or is it a tall tale?

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Tidbit swallows a watermelon seed and worries he's going to grow a watermelon in his tummy.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Flour gets stuck on top of the music shop, the kids and Penny must find a way to get him down.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are playing in their clubhouse. Together the children create adventure stories about wild animals, and they let the parents play too.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus with her friends, but Hercules wants to play his motorcycle game instead. Luckily Bluey has a solution to keep everyone happy.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the Baby Pea-Rexes help a lost Baby Cuke back to its herd, but the teething Cuke's incessant need to suck makes the process more difficult than expected.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: The cadets pull out all the stops to impress a beach inspector and win the prestigious Bestest Beach Award, all in honour of their dedicated lifeguard heroes.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: A birthday party misunderstanding.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: When the Octopod breaks down, Tweak and the crew search for a missing part aboard an abandoned prototype of the ship, not realising something lives there.

programme.title: Bluey Fancy Restaurant
programme.desc: Dancing, lights, and quesadillas at Art and Evie's moody cupboard cafe.

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Luke and Rachael are creating a mural of all things big and small in the outback; Rachael and Scrap go digging for dinosaur bones.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Mike hears eerie singing and glowing lights in the sea near the lighthouse, he calls Agent Price and Agent Sparkes to check it out.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: The spies play a series of games against Silver Paw, trying to win back the dominoes she's stolen from the kids' domino run.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Missing Appalams
programme.desc: Nikhil and Jay are detectives today. When the homemade appalams go missing under their watch, they need to solve the case and save lunch!

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Uh oh! The playground is closed for the day and Grover is beside himself. How can he play without the playground?

programme.title: Mittens and Pants
programme.desc: Pants the puppy is feeling responsible. But is he responsible enough to babysit all ten of Ms. McRoosters baby chicks?

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: BaBa wants to play the flute as well as MeMo. MeMo helps BaBa to play the recorder.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups go on an adventure to make some real magic pies. But when they make too many for them to eat, will they find another way to use them up?

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Eddie makes hair washing fun by discovering some thinking tricks as part of the bath time routine.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When it's Bingo's turn to bring her Kindy's Bob Bilby puppet home and record their weekend in the scrapbook, the family resolve to put down their screens and show him a good time.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds explore a supermarket! They follow deliveries, restocking, and cool rooms, then zip through aisles on a trolley ride and bleep through the busy checkout!

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: The Makery is undergoing drastic refurbishments, so Nim keeps busy by making a castle from bottles, a monster from an apple and a campsite from cardboard.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Captain Feathersword and Paloma the Mermaid are in the Wiggly Kitchen waiting for The Wiggles to arrive. Captain has found a letter inviting him to come for a dance, who could the letter be from?

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: When Andy inadvertently destroys an audio tape of a recording that Mr Hammond made of a baby alligator, it's up to him to replace it.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo race to deliver food faster than speedy Filo... maybe too fast!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George notice they have shadows, and no matter how fast they walk, run, or jump - they can't lose them.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It is International Day at playgroup and Peppa and her friends have dressed up as countries of the world.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: While Kiri is playing with Rockaroonie, Lou sees an island in the middle of the lake that's completely covered in flowers. How can he get there?

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When Wasabi injures their leg during a game of shadow jump, Ginger and the Peas are forced to wait on him hand and foot.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: After seeing a toy elf rocket, the king orders a real rocket to fly to the moon. Elf honour is at stake and the elves make a rocket in record time. For the trip, Nanny packs a picnic.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Sunny REALLY wants to win the Box Car Derby and has a meltdown when his team isn't serious enough.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Mum's got a new sound bowl, and Triggs is eager to join her for some meditation. But Maddie soon begins to realise that people have very different ways to feel calm and relaxed.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: When Dad discovers that something has been nibbling the veggies in his veggie patch, Maddie + Triggs decide to find out who this veggie monster really is!

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Benjamin and Hettie find an old treasure map that leads to Blue Whiskers' Pirate Shipwreck! They ask Stanley to help them find it using his submarine, and maybe bring it back as an exhibit for everyone to enjoy.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts And The Porcupine Puffer
programme.desc: Barnacles, Kwazii and Peso venture back inside a whale shark to retrieve a porcupine puffer fish that was accidentally swallowed.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: The story continues after Luna secretly steals Motsuki's teleport power. Gekko and Catboy investigate, but mess up with catastrophic results. Can they find it in themselves to put it right?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: It's a day out; Duggee and the squirrels are off on an underwater adventure with Betty's dad in his submarine. They see all the wonders of the underwater world, including a giant sea stallion and some jazz fish.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: The cadets pull out all the stops to impress a beach inspector and win the prestigious Bestest Beach Award, all in honour of their dedicated lifeguard heroes.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Sarah puts on a captivating lunchtime theatre show outside the Wholefish Cafe. It's so good that Charlie doesn't notice his stove burst into flames.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Hazelnut Raid
programme.desc: When Peter accidentally destroys the squirrels' store of nuts with one of Mr Bouncer's misfiring inventions, Peter sets off to perilous Owl Island to replace them.

programme.title: Cookie Monster's Foodie Truck
programme.desc: Cookie Monster and Gonger are Monster Foodies. They get a call and take an order from their friend who needs help with making a treat that looks like grass to give to their dog after their bath.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel is so excited because today is his first day at Day Camp! While he's on a hike with his friends and counselor they find bugs and play a game in nature. Daniel has a happy day exploring at day camp!

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Nim has overslept but that doesn't stop her creativity! She makes a giraffe picture, a strawberry monster plant brownie and a pretty perfect peacock costume.

programme.title: Play School: World by Night
programme.desc: Michelle and Matt are out and about on nighttime adventures! Join them with Joey on an exciting trip to the Play School Moonlight Cinema and head to the festival of lights for a special surprise in the sky.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Pop into the fun with 'Hot Poppin' Popcorn' and a Tree of Wisdom tune! The Wiggles create a happiness storybook, Lucia joins a Dorothy Dance Party, and the day ends with a preschool performance.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!
programme.desc: Emily longs for a bit of adventure and it's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish has her first-ever ballet exam the next day and practises before bed. Pola sticks his head in and says she's doing a good job but getting a good night's rest will help more.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish is in the middle of an imaginative adventure, dressed in shining armour and about to rescue a Tash in distress. Suddenly, Bobby appears in the same armour, striking the same heroic pose.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When Ginger gets stung by an Appleflyus, it leaves a painful and incredibly itchy sore, but the only way to cure it is with the tail of an Appleflyus.

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back 220 million years to the era of the postosuchus, a giant, crocodile-like creature that roamed North America in the time of the earliest dinosaurs.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: The treasure of the Knights of Swoppiton awaits! If only Mojo and Bo can find it.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Flounder helps other chefs at an event.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit gives Peppa and her friends a tour around an exercise park. However, the machines are only for grownups, so the kids do funny exercises instead and pretend to be frogs and crabs!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy go on a trip to the children's festival where there is singing, making crafts and listening to stories. They stay overnight in a tent, though it looks like it's going to rain.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie + Triggs are intrigued when Mum suggests they use the microwave to cook dinner; can this singing robot microwave really make a healthy meal that's delicious and nutritious?

programme.title: Stan and Gran
programme.desc: Stan and Gran find a mysterious old carved piece of wood while they're beach combing. Is it from the wreck of Porthole Pete or a carving of a mermaid?

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When pickle-wielding Norman tries to protect Pontypandy from being attacked by Moon Men, his panic ends up causing a fire at Joe's garage!

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Big Trev tells Pounce and Gemma a tale from his childhood as they wait for his elderly turtle friend, Salty, to arrive.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Mimic Octopus
programme.desc: The Octonauts recruit a shape-shifting mimic octopus to help them recover an important vial of medicinal algae from a moray eel's lair.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Lizard's potion turns him into a fire-breathing dragon.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Flour gets stuck on top of the music shop, the kids and Penny must find a way to get him down.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Whilst Dad is stuck in the desert D.O.R.I.S. tries to give Cosima and Big Lizard a lesson on friction. As things begin to heat up a creature steals Cosima's only means to locate Dad!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels hear a strange sound that they can not identify. With Duggee's help they learn all about sound and how to listen for different qualities in the noises they hear.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Queen Thistle has a beautiful new teapot so delicate that no one is allowed to touch it. Holly accidentally breaks the teapot and tries to fix it with Ben's help.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: It's the twins Pooka and Luka's birthday and they each need help figuring out what to give each other. Pooka is very picky!

programme.title: Gardening Australia Junior
programme.desc: In Kakadu, Traditional Owners welcome Clarence to join them weaving pandanus. They harvest leaves, then dye, dry, and weave them into beautiful creations.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Bingo stops playing Bluey's spy game in the park, their device to control the grown-ups stops working properly! Bluey now sees how important Bingo is and needs to win her back!

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: When the farmer takes Timmy's favourite sheep-dolly, the little lamb won't stop crying so Shaun rallies the flock to get it back from Pidsley - the farm cat.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Nubs and the Jedi protect his favourite tree.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: The Jedi help a young bounty hunter find her brother.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?
programme.desc: The gang helps Carol Burnett beta test her brand new virtual reality Movieland world.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Jimmy and Kara race to stop Brainiac's invasion of Earth. Lois tries to free Clark from Brainiac's control, only to lose herself in an alternate reality where Superman never left Krypton.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: In an explosive Main Event, the up-and-coming Uppercut takes on one of the baddest bots on the block, Sawblaze.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: In the second of the semi-finals, who has the will and the skill to conquer the infamous Travelator and win a coveted place in the grand final?

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Merlin and Arthur are sent on a dangerous mission to capture the Cup of Life, a powerful magical artifact that carries the gift of immortality. Before they can retrieve the cup, they are captured by the slave trader, Jarl.

programme.title: Good Game Spawn Point
programme.sub-title: Harry and Gem Share the Secret of Mana!
programme.desc: This episode, Gem is joined by GGSP super host Harry! And he's brought Secret of Mana! Plus, a fiery segment of Boss Level Builds, Screen Goblin answers a burning question in Ask SG.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: A figure-skating trainer named Philippe gets akumatised into Frozer. Armed with evil ice skates, he wants to turn Paris into a Kingdom of Ice. Ladybug and Cat Noir can't get cold feet if they want to stop him.

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: Harold uncovers a secret plot that Chef's new parrot is hatching and tries to save his teacher only to discover that Sugar figured it out before him.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: When the bears find a box full of free stuff at a yard sale, they go on their own adventures.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears lose their own home to dangerous animals.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears ride a tube down a dangerous river.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears and their new friend, Squatter Otter, take up residence in a mysterious house made of meat.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: A Message From the Future The Incursion of Goku Black!
programme.desc: After regaining consciousness, Future Trunks describes how he came to arrive in the present. But apparently not even the gods are allowed to meddle with the past.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Goku vs. Black! A Closed-Off Road to the Future
programme.desc: Black suddenly appears from a mysterious portal. Goku sees this as an opportunity to test his look-alike's power firsthand.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: Buttercup joins Jemmica in a quest for adventure, but how far will she go?

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: An overprotective Heath accuses Grace of sabotage, while she and Jonah make a bet to make it on to A-Troupe, Izzy grapples with keeping Anthony's secret.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Famous monk St Augustine struggles to introduce Christianity to Saxon England; we witness a daring escape from the Tower of London; and Joan of Arc's story is quite an unusual one for a teenage girl.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Interrupting Intern
programme.desc: Maudie is upset when Ezra, Ava, and Kyle promote their new intern to an Inbestigator after he surprisingly solves a case before Maudie.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: Switch Your Partner Round And Round
programme.desc: Olive and Otto discover what life would have been like if Ms O had assigned them different partners.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The tube system breaks and Olive and Otto are left stranded in a dan-gerous forest.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Nubs searches for a rare, stolen plant.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Newton becomes bad when he's changed by a mysterious asteroid.
